us.label: US News
us.subtitle: Top domestic developments from the last 1–2 days

articles.title: Wildfire smoke blankets major US cities from Midwest to East Coast
bullets: Millions faced unhealthy air across the Great Lakes, Northeast and Mid-Atlantic.
Smoke came from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota, according to AP.
Forecasters warned conditions may persist while fires continue burning.

articles.title: Trump raises doubts about US elections in primetime remarks
bullets: AP summarized Trump’s remarks as questioning the legitimacy of US elections.
The remarks came ahead of the 2026 midterm campaign stretch.
The story drew responses over voting rules and election administration.

articles.title: Supreme Court seeks responses on West Bengal voter-list appeal delays
bullets: India’s Supreme Court sought replies from election authorities and West Bengal officials.
The plea concerns faster disposal of Special Intensive Revision voter appeals.
The case focuses on transparency and timing in the voter-list process.

articles.title: ICE-related scrutiny grows after shooting and detention-center reports
bullets: Congressional and legal scrutiny continued around recent ICE-related incidents.
Reports cited questions over training, detention conditions and use of force.
Immigration enforcement remained a major domestic political flashpoint.

articles.title: Cyclospora outbreak discussed as cases spread across more than 30 states
bullets: A multistate cyclosporiasis outbreak remained under public-health scrutiny.
Reports tied some illnesses to food-service supply chains under investigation.
Health officials urged caution as case counts continued to be tracked.

global.label: Global
global.subtitle: Major worldwide stories and geopolitical developments

articles.title: US and Iran trade strikes as Strait of Hormuz conflict escalates
bullets: AP reported new US-Iran strikes targeting infrastructure and military sites.
Kuwait reported damage as the conflict spread across the Gulf region.
Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remained a central flashpoint.

articles.title: US-Iran escalation pushes Gulf infrastructure and shipping risks higher
bullets: Reuters reported a seventh straight night of US attacks on Iran.
Iranian strikes targeted US allies and infrastructure in the Gulf.
Energy markets watched risks to shipping and desalination facilities.

articles.title: Ukraine pushes air-defense coalition as Russian missile threat persists
bullets: Ukraine and nine other countries announced a coalition focused on ballistic-missile defense.
Kyiv continued seeking more air-defense capacity against Russian attacks.
European security concerns remained tied to Russia’s strike campaign.

articles.title: Europe battles wildfires, drought and storm damage after heat wave
bullets: Reuters reported major wildfire activity in northeastern Spain.
More than 1,000 people were evacuated as aircraft supported firefighting.
Officials linked dry vegetation to recent heat waves across Europe.

articles.title: China faces severe flooding after powerful Typhoon Bavi
bullets: Reuters reported flooding in Hebei and Liaoning after Typhoon Bavi.
Videos showed submerged roads, swept-away vehicles and residents moving through flooded streets.
Authorities prioritized evacuations and emergency shelter in high-risk areas.

india.label: India News
india.subtitle: Top India stories from the last 1–2 days

articles.title: IMD warns of heavy rain across Northeast India
bullets: The weather office forecast widespread rain across northeastern states.
Parts of Arunachal Pradesh faced the highest risk during the current spell.
Kurung Kumey remained under red alert for July 18 and 19.

articles.title: PM Modi flags off India’s first hydrogen-powered train from Haryana
bullets: The hydrogen-powered train was flagged off from Jind in Haryana.
Officials called it a Make in India clean-mobility milestone.
The project places India among countries operating hydrogen trains.

articles.title: Centre may reintroduce delimitation and women’s reservation bills
bullets: Sources said the bills could return in the Monsoon Session of Parliament.
The government previously failed to secure a two-thirds majority for delimitation.
NDA ministers were tasked with building support among parties.

articles.title: Kedarnath Yatra resumes after landslide blocks trek route
bullets: The pilgrimage resumed after a five-hour halt near the Chirbasa helipad route.
Authorities cleared rain-triggered boulders from the pedestrian trail.
IMD issued an orange alert for heavy rain in parts of Uttarakhand.

articles.title: Congress to join Omar Abdullah’s J&K statehood protest
bullets: Congress said it would join the National Conference’s protest in Delhi.
The protest seeks restoration of Jammu and Kashmir’s statehood.
J&K Congress said central leaders had been invited for the July 20 event.

stocks.label: US Stocks
stocks.subtitle: Top US market movers and equity-market stories

articles.title: Wall Street ends lower as chip selloff broadens
bullets: The S&P 500, Nasdaq and Dow all closed lower on Friday.
Reuters said the AI-linked stock pullback broadened into risk-off trading.
Major indexes also posted weekly losses.

articles.title: Netflix shares slide after weak forecast and growth concerns
bullets: Netflix tumbled after its quarterly update and guidance disappointed investors.
The stock hit a 52-week low during Friday trading.
Analysts cited concerns over viewing time and future growth.

articles.title: Intuitive Surgical plunges on procedure-growth and insurance concerns
bullets: Shares fell sharply after the company kept its procedure-growth outlook unchanged.
Management warned insurance-plan changes could delay patient care.
Investors focused on slowing US procedure growth despite an earnings beat.

articles.title: Travelers jumps after profit beats expectations
bullets: Travelers reported a 44% jump in second-quarter core profit.
Lower catastrophe losses and investment income helped results.
Shares rose as earnings beat Wall Street expectations.

articles.title: Apple overtakes Nvidia as investors reassess AI trade
bullets: Apple briefly became the world’s most valuable company again.
Nvidia fell as chip and AI-linked stocks came under pressure.
The move reflected rotation away from crowded semiconductor trades.

articles.title: US oil firms sign more than $60 billion in Iraq agreements
bullets: Western energy firms signed oil, gas and pipeline agreements with Iraq.
Chevron agreements included work on alternative export routes.
The deals aim to reduce reliance on the Strait of Hormuz route.
articles.source: Reuters / Associated Press via Al Jazeera

articles.title: Goldman Sachs profit rises on trading surge and dealmaking
bullets: Goldman reported higher second-quarter profit.
Market volatility boosted equities trading activity.
Corporate dealmaking remained resilient despite geopolitical turmoil.

articles.title: Coca-Cola halts Fairlife dairy production after ransomware attack
bullets: Coca-Cola suspended production at a Fairlife dairy facility.
The disruption followed a ransomware attack, TechCrunch reported.
The incident added to a wave of corporate cyber incidents.

articles.title: Databricks valuation jumps to $188 billion in new funding round
bullets: Databricks announced funding valuing the company at $188 billion.
The round was led by Coatue, according to TechCrunch.
The company has benefited from enterprise demand for AI and data tools.

articles.title: Amazon fixes AWS bug that billed some customers billions
bullets: Amazon said it was fixing an AWS billing bug.
TechCrunch reported some customers saw erroneous multibillion-dollar bills.
The issue affected billing displays rather than actual expected payments.

tech.label: Tech
tech.subtitle: AI, platforms, cybersecurity and emerging technology

articles.title: China’s Moonshot unveils Kimi K3, a giant open-weight AI model
bullets: Moonshot introduced Kimi K3, a 2.8 trillion-parameter open-weight AI model.
Reuters said the model approaches leading US frontier-model performance.
The launch intensified debate over China’s progress in AI.

articles.title: Apple and Google ordered to remove ‘nudify’ apps from app stores
bullets: San Francisco ordered Apple and Google to purge apps that create nonconsensual deepfake sexual images.
The city cited California laws covering nonconsensual intimate deepfakes.
Both companies said they had removed or suspended apps after review.

articles.title: Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi smoke confusion
bullets: Zoox recalled software after a robotaxi incident involving heavy smoke.
The vehicle reportedly became confused by smoke conditions.
The recall highlights edge cases for autonomous-driving systems.

articles.title: AWS billing bug sparks erroneous multibillion-dollar charges
bullets: Some AWS customers saw extreme billing errors because of a software bug.
Amazon said it was working on a fix.
The case underscored operational risks in cloud-platform billing systems.

articles.title: Databricks extends AI push with $188 billion valuation
bullets: Databricks’ new valuation reflects investor demand for enterprise AI platforms.
The company has emphasized AI governance, agents and open-model cost control.
Its latest round follows several large fundraising events since 2024.
